title: Demographics of Vanuatu
content: This article is about the demographic features of the population of Vanuatu, including population density, ethnicity, education level, health of the populace, economic status, religious affiliations and other aspects of the population. 4% of the people living in Vanuatu are Europeans. Vital statistics. Births and deaths Note: Birth and death registration incomplete in 2012-2014 period CIA World Factbook demographic statistics. The following demographic statistics are from the CIA World Factbook, unless otherwise indicated. Languages. First Language
